title: SpecJobRequest
description: Request body for POST /api/service/spec-jobs — create a new spec job from a brief

brief.description: Rough description of the software to be specified. Guides initial structure and content generation.

mode.description: Execution mode: 'assisted' = job waits for human patch review; 'autonomous' = SpecForge runs the full spec loop end-to-end

constraints.description: Optional key-value constraints passed to the spec generation agent (e.g., framework, language, focus)

workspaceId.description: Target workspace ID. If omitted, defaults to the session's active workspace (local dev) or request context (production).

examples.brief: A real-time collaborative spec editor with live multiplayer support and governed AI patch proposals
Mobile app for task tracking with offline sync
